name: Mexican Chicken & Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, mix 2/3 of the tomato sauce with spices.
2. Add chopped cooked chicken to the sauce and stir occasionally.
3. Cook over low heat until ready to serve.
4. Prepare rice as per package instructions.
5. Once the rice is done, add the remaining 1/3 of the tomato sauce and cook for a few more minutes.
6. Serve by placing rice on plates, topped with chicken-sauce mixture.
7. Add shredded cheese and sprinkle with sour cream, picante sauce, and diced tomatoes if desired.
